data.description: Iran: Air defenses intercept hostile targets in the eastern city of Mashhad
Air defense units in Iran’s Mashhad reportedly intercept hostile targets, according to local reports.

data.title: Ex-FTX engineering head fined $3.7M in CFTC lawsuit for role in company’s collapse. Received no jail time for assisting authorities.
data.description: After the collapse of FTX in November 2022, Singh found himself in legal trouble as the SEC, CFTC, and US Department of Justice took action against him. However, Singh managed to avoid a lengthy prison sentence by cooperating with authorities.

data.title: Alabama recently recognized DAOs legal status under DUNA, becoming 2nd US state to do so. Legislation aims to support innovation and empower internet-native communities to compete with big tech. Miles Jennings, a16z, commented on the significance of this move.
data.description: According to a statement by Miles Jennings from a16z, the new legislation aims to foster innovation, ensure the safety of participants, and enable internet-native communities to rival big tech giants.

data.title: Deposits/withdrawals halted by Drift Protocol amidst a suspected $200M attack on exchange, possibly due to private key leak.
data.description: According to a threat researcher, a decentralized crypto exchange was possibly compromised in a $200 million exploit following a leak of a crypto wallet's private key.

data.title: Ethias Goes Live on Guidewire Cloud Platform, Building a Trusted Foundation for AI Innovation
data.description: In LIÈGE, Belgium, Ethias SA and Guidewire (NYSE: GWRE) have revealed that Belgian insurer Ethias has successfully implemented Guidewire Cloud Platform, ushering in a crucial phase in upgrading its core systems. The move to Guidewire Cloud Platform equips Ethias with the reliability of Guidewire core systems, paired with a flexible, secure, and consistently upgraded cloud framework. This shift will enable Ethias to enhance operational flexibility, foster constant innovation, and adapt to changing market dynamics.

data.title: StairMed Secures RMB 500 Million Financing Led by Alibaba, Joined by Tencent
data.description: Shanghai-based company StairMed Technology Co., Ltd. has disclosed the completion of a strategic funding round amounting to RMB 500 million on April 2, 2026. The funding was spearheaded by Alibaba, with significant ongoing involvement from current shareholders.

data.title: Kalmar supplies hybrid straddle carriers to PSA Antwerp
data.description: An agreement has been reached for the provision of 14 Kalmar hybrid straddle carriers to PSA Antwerp in Belgium by Kalmar.

data.title: SecurityTech on the Rise: G+D Reports Strong Order Intake and High Resilience in 2025
data.description: In the fiscal year 2025, Giesecke+Devrient (G+D) reaffirmed its dominance as a global leader in SecurityTech for critical infrastructure. In a landscape where security plays a vital role in maintaining stability, G+D showcased promising growth potential. During that year, G+D secured a record order intake of €3.6 billion, marking an increase of 8%. Despite exchange rate fluctuations hindering growth, the company's revenue rose to €3.2 billion, a 1% increase. These key financial indicators underscore G+D's robust performance in the market.

data.title: Accor Welcomes Aimie, a New Team Member and Performance Engine for Finance
data.description: Accor, a prominent player in the hospitality industry, has taken a significant step in transforming its finance operations in the Middle East, Africa, and Asia Pacific regions. The company has ushered in a new era by incorporating Aimie into its finance teams – an innovative move that marks the advent of enterprise finance evolution. Aimie, hailed as the world’s premier autonomous AI Cash Collection Agent, is a creation of Sidetrade, a leading provider of Order-to-Cash Intelligence solutions. This cutting-edge technology facilitates direct engagement with customers, assessing invoices, and autonomously refining Order-to-Cash strategies. This integration of Aimie reflects Accor’s commitment to embracing modern advancements, with a focus on optimizing financial processes.

data.title: X Square Robot Hosts Inaugural EAIDC 2026, Advancing Real-World Deployment of Embodied AI
data.description: X Square Robot, a prominent company in embodied AI and humanoid robotics based in Shenzhen, China, recently completed the inaugural Embodied AI Developers Conference (EAIDC 2026). This event marked the first of its kind, attracting developers from around the world. The conference showcased the latest advancements in the field and provided a platform for networking and collaboration. Key figures included [important numbers], emphasizing the significance of this gathering for the global tech community.
